closed_by: P1 fix wave (commits eca7274, 95470aa, 1c547f4, 4098bc5, bab71b6, 9703e6b) + re-QC wave 2 (reports qc1-wave2, qc2-wave2, qc3-wave2)

items.title: Work create idempotency is not atomic and ignores idempotency write failure
items.evidence: create_work_atomic (nexus-local-db/src/works.rs:241) wraps find+insert+record in single sqlx transaction; UNIQUE violation maps to 200 OK replay. Handler test create_work_idempotent_replay_returns_200 (works_api.rs:154) confirms.

items.title: All 5 new /v1/local/works* endpoints return 409 Conflict instead of required 401 for missing creator context
items.evidence: All 5 works handlers (works.rs:139, 141, 203, 205, 245, etc.) use AuthRequired; errors.rs:140 maps AuthRequired to UNAUTHORIZED 401. Tests *_returns_401_without_creator cover the 5 endpoints.

items.title: append_inspiration response count is wrong under concurrent appends; substr-based JSON append is fragile
items.evidence: append_inspiration (works.rs:558) uses tx + Rust Vec append + full UPDATE inside tx; handler derives count from post-state updated.inspiration_log (no pre len+1).

items.title: CLI creator run / system preset yield raw Network error when daemon down, not friendly DaemonNotRunning hint
items.evidence: errors.rs:306 From<reqwest>: is_connect()||is_timeout() → DaemonNotRunning (else Network); display has 'daemon start' suggestion. Tests health_check connection_refused, daemon_not_running_display, replay_delta_daemon_not_running all pass.

items.title: Work API response shape drift — creative_brief/inspiration_log/schedule_ids returned as raw JSON strings
items.evidence: WorkApiDto (works.rs:23, R-V133P1-10 comment) + From<WorkRecord> at handler boundary. get/append return WorkApiDto; List uses summary. Fields are typed structures, not raw strings. No creator_id leak.
